summary: Excellent audience recording of a magical 1995 East Coast show with standout Terrapin, Hell in a Bucket and Bird Song, despite a weak Samba solo.
review: The crowd‑sourced tape is praised as the cleanest and loudest version of this June 30 1995 performance, capturing a rain‑soaked night that many attendees call one of the tour’s best. Highlights include Terrapin, Hell in a Bucket, Bird Song, Standing on the Moon and a rare Candy Man, while the Samba in the Rain segment suffers from a missing Jerry solo.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly and describe the audience recording as exceptionally clear; only one review notes a minor performance flaw, leading to an overall strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, loud, and clear capture with no reported dropouts or balance issues; regarded as the best available audience source for this show.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set enjoyed sunny, dance‑friendly vibes; second set deepened the magic with rain and lightning, leading to an atmospheric transition that many fans cite as a highlight of the night.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for creating the rain atmosphere; however, missed his solo during Samba in the Rain.
